name: Vol Au Vent
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a ball with the kitchen foil.
2. Roll out the dough to 1/4 inch thickness.
3. Cut two squares from the rolled-out dough.
4. Place one square on a baking sheet.
5. Place the foil ball in the center of the pastry.
6. Cover with the second sheet of dough.
7. Using the ring from a tart mold as a guide, cut a circle about 1 1/2 inches away from the foil.
8. Make a hole on top for steam to escape.
9. Decorate with trimmings if desired.
10. Brush egg wash over the pastry.
11. Bake in a preheated oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes. Reduce the heat to 300 degrees Fahrenheit after 20 minutes.
12. Allow to cool, cut off the top and carefully remove the foil.
13. Place hot filling inside and serve, or reheat if needed.
